body: ## Purpose Update dependencies for recent minor releases of CliMA packages: ``` Updating `~/clima/ClimaLand.jl/.buildkite/Project.toml` [052768ef] ↑ CUDA v5.8.2 ⇒ v5.8.3 [d414da3d] ↑ ClimaCore v0.14.38 ⇒ v0.14.39 [08f4d4ce] ~ ClimaLand v0.18.2 `..` ⇒ v0.19.0 `..` [5c42b081] ↑ ClimaParams v0.11.1 ⇒ v0.12.1 [a93c6f00] ↑ DataFrames v1.7.0 ⇒ v1.7.1 [e98cc03f] ↑ Insolation v0.9.5 ⇒ v0.10.1 [49b00bb7] ↑ SurfaceFluxes v0.12.1 ⇒ v0.12.2 [b60c26fb] ↑ Thermodynamics v0.13.1 ⇒ v0.14.0 ``` Also makes a minor release because of recent breaking changes in ClimaLand - see NEWS.md for details. Closes #1365, #1364, and #1357 ## Note The docbuild was failing because the output from the global snowy_land.jl tutorial was too large (even with semicolons suppressing output). See the error below. To fix this I lowered the resolution of that run and added a note about it. There were also warnings about the output size for 2 other docs pages, so I minimized those as well (APIs/shared_utilities.md, standalone/Soil/evaporation.md).
title: tag v0.19.0; up deps

body:
closes #1346

preview: https://clima.github.io/ClimaLand.jl/previews/PR1367/

Note: before merging, need to checkout docs/make.jl

Only the structs themselves show up in the API docs, not the constructor functions.
This commit fixes this issue.
title: Add constructors API
